name: doom
description: Doom Code makes Visual Studio Code feel like Doom Emacs by applying a curated, opinionated set of settings that emphasize a fast, keyboard-first workflow and a clean, distraction-free editor.

bindings.name: Show active file in tree/explorer view
Search in a project with a selection
Search all references in side bar
Maximize editor group and hide side bar

commands.title: Doom Code: Clean Up Stale Settings

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
